title: Kettimelam kottum satham lyrics pesu songs lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kettimelam
Singer: Vijay Yesudas, Priya
Lyrics : Snehan
Music Director : Yuvan Shankar Raja

Kettimelam kottum satham mella ketkiradho nenjil
O hohO vetkappattu nenjam ippo aadappaarkkiradho oonjal
Kettimelam kottum satham mella ketkiradho nenjil
O hohO vetkappattu nenjam ippo aadappaarkkiradho oonjal

Nenjikkul pala aasai irukku, Neram varum podhu solven unakku
Maalai vandhaal theerum andha kanakku, Maalaiyai mannan tharuvaan
O hoho hooohhh ho...
{hindi lyrics.. not sure what it is}

Indha boomiengum, pookkum pookkalellaam,
Endhan koondhal kudippogum naal indru
Endhan kazhuththinil oru maalaiyaai,
Vandhu vizhum vaanavilthaan

Un valaiyalgal, en viralgalil,
sikkikkondu sinungum naal indru
Nee naanathil thalai kunigaiyil,
vaazhththu sollum kavidhai thaane hey hey..

Kattivaiththa aasai kattavizhndhu parakka,
Ennudaiya penmai rekkaigalai virikka
Ennudaiya mannan eppozhudhum kannan.
Vandu endhan karam pidippaan

Indha naaley, nam vaazhvin irandaam baagam aagum
Naanum unnai kaippidithadhu endhan yogam aagum

Endhan vaanamengum, pala ninaivugal,
ennai utruppaarkkindradhy nenjey
en manadhukkul oru maaligai irukkudhey unakkaaga...

Indha ulagiley, miga azhagiyai,
sondhamaakka poagiren naan indru
Aval enakkena endru therindhadhum,
enni enni viyandheney ye hey

Ingu thaaney boomi pudhithaai irukku,
idhupoala inbam vandhadhillai enakkum
Manja thaali kodu mazhalaippol thodu,
mella mella sivakkiren

Minnal theril naan unnai amarththi vaan veli poaven
megam kondey nee vaazhum veettai katti mudippen

Kettimelam kottum satham mella ketkiradho nenjil
O hohO vetkappattu nenjam ippo aadappaarkkiradho oonjal

Nenjikkul pala aasai irukku
Neram varum podhu solven unakku
Maalai vandhaal theerum andha kanakku
Maalaiyai mannan tharuvaan
O hoho hooohhh ho...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kettimelam Kottum Satham?

The song is a romantic melody that captures the essence of love and celebration.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Priya and Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for Pesu?

The music was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What role does the song play in the movie?

In Pesu, the song adds a romantic and celebratory mood to the storyline.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kettimelam Kottum Satham from the movie Pesu is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the joy and celebration of love. Sung by Priya and Vijay Yesudas, the song features soothing melodies composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja. The lyrics by Snehan evoke a sense of happiness and togetherness, making it perfect for weddings and anniversaries. This melody resonates with listeners, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere that enhances the film's romantic narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kettimelam Kottum Satham from the movie Pesu, where Yuvan's soulful music meets the captivating voices of Priya and Vijay Yesudas. This romantic duet beautifully captures the essence of love and celebration. Dive into a world of soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics that resonate with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: The sound of wedding drums is softly heard in the heart. Oh, the shy heart is now dancing like a swing.
There are many desires in my heart. I will tell you when the time comes. When evening comes, that calculation will end. The king will give the evening.
All over this earth, all the blooming flowers, today is the day they will adorn my hair. A rainbow will come and fall as a garland on my neck.
Your bangles are caught on my fingers, jingling today. In shyness, you bow your head, and that's the poem of blessings.
The desires that were tied are now flying free. My femininity spreads its wings. My king is always Krishna. He will come and hold my hand.
Today will become the second part of our life. Holding you is my fortune.
All over my sky, many memories surround me. In my heart, there is a palace for you.
In this world, I am going to make the most beautiful mine today. When I realized she is mine, I was amazed thinking about it.
Here, the earth feels new. I have never felt such happiness. Give the yellow thread, touch like a child, slowly I blush.
I will take you in a lightning chariot and go to the sky. I will build a house with clouds for you to live in.
The sound of wedding drums is softly heard in the heart. Oh, the shy heart is now dancing like a swing.
There are many desires in my heart. I will tell you when the time comes. When evening comes, that calculation will end. The king will give the evening.
